afterSnapshot.name: serveSailingJs
afterSnapshot.purpose: Serve the sailing weather JavaScript with water detection utilities from the database.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The modified JS (with water detection code) is stored in the _temp_build table after verification. Serving it via a handler avoids re-uploading the full 45KB asset content while ensuring the verified, correct version is served.
implementation: Handler reads the verified JS content from the _temp_build table and serves it with the correct MIME type and cache headers.
